_note: Processor-module working model for the .009 FDC-era target. The board has 32 РУ5 sockets D60-D91; D84-D91 are populated and D60-D83 are empty expansion rows. Every socket retains the traced RU3/RU5 population-option rails: pin 1 is NC inside a populated РУ5 but carries the VBB option copper, pin 8 carries selectable +5/+12 V, and pin 16 is the array return. D2/D94 PROM truth and routed-snapshot parity, the remaining D30 section-B endpoints, the D105-to-WAIT revision handoff, and 9 official FDC devices with untraced functional pins remain explicit design boundaries.
